category_sources: official homepage describes hfsutils as tools for manipulating Macintosh HFS volumes from UNIX and other systems; source_facts.description says tools for reading and writing Macintosh volumes
display_name_sources: official homepage title is HFS Utilities
docs_sources: official homepage is the best available documentation surface, with contents, status, availability, feedback, and related work sections
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage links FTP source archive but no official source-control repository was identified
tags_sources: official homepage lists command-line programs such as hformat, hmount, hls, and hcopy for Macintosh HFS volumes
